title: Settings
description: Quiet defaults, private account access, and a narrow first section.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your display name and profile picture. You can restore your Google photo after choosing or removing a custom photo.
profile.name: Display name
profile.hint: Choose a photo from your library. Web only. Max 5 MB.
profile.permissionNeeded: Photo library access is needed to choose a profile picture.
profile.tooLarge: Choose an image smaller than 5 MB.
profile.removeHint: Delete this picture. You can upload a new one or use your Google account photo.

reminders.title: Reminders & notifications
reminders.description: Reminders stay explicit and off by default. They should support use, not create pressure.
reminders.permissionDenied: Notification permission was not granted. Reminder settings were saved as off.
reminders.webUnsupported: Web reminders are not supported in this browser. On iPhone or iPad, add Selftend to the Home Screen before enabling reminders.
reminders.webNotConfigured: Web reminders are not configured for this deployment. Reminder settings were saved as off.
reminders.serviceWorkerUnavailable: Web reminders could not be prepared in this browser. Reminder settings were saved as off.
reminders.subscriptionFailed: Web reminders could not be enabled. Reminder settings were saved as off.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Show the app and tool introductions again when you want a fresh walkthrough.
onboarding.appBody1: Selftend is a calm place for guided self-help and private reflection.
onboarding.appBody2: It is not a diagnosis tool, therapy replacement, or emergency support. Use local emergency or crisis resources if you need urgent help.
onboarding.appBody3: The first section focuses on CBT thought records. Reminders stay optional, quiet, and easy to turn off.

account.title: Account
account.exportHint: Get a copy of your saved data as JSON.
account.deleteHint: Permanently delete your account and all saved records.
account.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all data including thought records, preferences, and profile. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteFailed: Deletion failed. Please try again or contact support.
account.deleteWarning: This action is permanent. Your account, profile, preferences, and app data will be deleted unless we are required to keep limited data for legal, security, or abuse-prevention reasons.

home.title: A calm starting point
home.description: The app starts with a single complete CBT section. Other modules stay out of the way until they are justified.
home.scopeBoundaryDescription: This product is for guided self-help and reflection. It is not diagnosis, therapy, or emergency support.
home.cbtSectionDescription: Start a guided thought record, review distortions, and keep one private history.
home.thoughtHistoryDescription: Review saved records, keep context, and revisit balanced thoughts without pressure.
home.settingsAndSupportDescription: Quiet reminders, support links, and legal boundaries live here.
home.noRecordsDescription: Once you save a record, the latest one will surface here.

cookieConsent.banner: We use essential browser storage (localStorage) to keep you signed in. No tracking cookies are used. You can manage optional preferences below.
cookieConsent.preferencesDescription: Manage how the app uses browser storage on your device.
cookieConsent.essentialDescription: Required for authentication. Cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Not currently used. This preference will apply if analytics are added in the future.

consent.title: Quick policy check
consent.description: We keep this brief: please review and accept the latest Privacy Policy and Terms to continue.
consent.checkbox: I am 18 or older, agree to the current Privacy Policy and Terms of Service, and consent to Selftend processing the self-help entries I choose to save, including any wellness or mental-health reflection content I enter.
consent.error: Unable to save consent. Please try again.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.description: Project links, public contact paths, policy pages, and clear safety boundaries.
supportPage.boundaryDescription: This app is built as guided self-help. If you need urgent help or crisis support, use local emergency and crisis resources instead of relying on the app.
supportPage.contactDescription: For support, include only the minimum details needed. Do not email urgent crisis details or private self-help entries.
supportPage.emailNotConfigured: Set EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_EMAIL before public launch. Until then, use GitHub issues for project feedback that does not include private health details.
supportPage.handlesCovers: Sign-in problems, sync failures, missing records, app crashes, bug reports, account deletion fallback, accessibility issues, and translation feedback.
supportPage.handlesNot: Support cannot provide crisis response, therapy, diagnosis, clinical advice, or help interpreting your records.

legal.title: Legal and boundaries
legal.description: Product boundaries, public policy pages, and launch-review reminders.
legal.launchReviewDescription: Policy text is in place for implementation review, but final organization details, contact details, and legal approval are still required before public launch.
legal.productBoundaryDescription: This app is for wellness and guided self-help. It does not diagnose, prescribe, replace therapy, or act as emergency support.
legal.licenseDescription: The repository is planned under AGPL-3.0-only. Reference repos and curated resource lists may inform design decisions, but their code, text, and assets are not copied casually into this project.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.description: Share a bug report, suggestion, or question. This opens your email app.
feedback.crisisWarning: Do not use this form for urgent crisis situations. If you need immediate help, use local emergency services or crisis resources.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Describe the issue or idea. Do not include private self-help entries or crisis details.
feedback.messageTooLong: Message must be 1000 characters or fewer.
